title: Croatian-Style Corn Sandwich
description: A fusion of Indian and Croatian flavors, this sandwich is a delightful twist on traditional cuisine. The corn adds a sweet and crunchy texture.
instructions: Toast the Croatian bread slices for 2-3 minutes.
In a bowl, mix together the cottage cheese, chopped cucumber, and chopped tomato.
Spread a layer of mayonnaise on each toasted bread slice.
Add a layer of the cottage cheese mixture on top of the mayonnaise.
Add a layer of corn kernels on top of the cottage cheese mixture.
Drizzle chutney over the corn kernels.
Assemble the sandwich by placing the remaining bread slice on top.
Place the sandwich in the panini press and cook for 3-4 minutes.
